name: ExtensionClinicalImpression_Status
title: R5: preparation | in-progress | not-done | on-hold | stopped | completed | entered-in-error | unknown
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ClinicalImpression.status` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ClinicalImpression.status` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ClinicalImpression.status` 1..1 `code`
*  R4B: `ClinicalImpression.status` 1..1 `code`
*  R4: `ClinicalImpression.status` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ClinicalImpression.status` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ClinicalImpression.status` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The target context `ClinicalImpression.status` is a modifier element, so this extension does not need to be defined as a modifier.

element.short: R5: preparation | in-progress | not-done | on-hold | stopped | completed | entered-in-error | unknown
element.comment:
Element `ClinicalImpression.status` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ClinicalImpression.status` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The target context `ClinicalImpression.status` is a modifier element, so this extension does not need to be defined as a modifier.
This element is labeled as a modifier because the status contains the code entered-in-error that marks the clinical impression as not currently valid.

element.short: preparation | in-progress | not-done | on-hold | stopped | completed | entered-in-error | unknown
element.definition: Identifies the workflow status of the assessment.
element.comment: This element is labeled as a modifier because the status contains the code entered-in-error that marks the clinical impression as not currently valid.

binding.description: The workflow state of a clinical impression.
